connectors.name: Salesforce Create Lead
connectors.request_body:
{% set body = body_text | from_json %}
{
  "FirstName": "{{ body.firstName }}",
  "LastName": "{{ body.lastName }}",
  "Email": "{{ body.email }}",
  "Company": "{{ body.company }}",
  "Title": "{{ body.title }}",
  "Phone": "{{ body.phone }}",
  "LeadSource": "{{ body.leadSource }}",
  "Region__c": "{{ body.region }}",
  "Product_Interest__c": "{{ body.productInterest }}",
  "Help_Type__c": "{{ body.helpType }}",
  "Partner_Notes__c": "{{ body.partnerNotes }}",
  "Requesting_On_Behalf_Of__c": "{{ body.requestingOnBehalfOf }}",
  "Referrer_Email__c": "{{ body.referrerEmail }}"
}
